summary: Implementation review approved for GH-106 implementation PR #129 at reviewed head 03058bd46629311f5bed076c9338e922f85f2459. The code adds a dependency-free Core run summary projection and an API Server GET /runs/:run_id route backed by the existing Run Record store, with targeted Core/API self-checks and no expansion into GH-107 through GH-110 scope.
reviewed_validation_summary: GH-106 validation and review passed on 2026-07-02 UTC: local checks passed (`pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime typecheck`, `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime test`, `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/api-server typecheck`, `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/api-server test`, `pnpm build`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm conformance`, `git diff --check`, `jq empty .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json .loom/specs/GH-106/build-evidence.json`); Loom checks passed (`loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-106 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-106 --json`, `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item GH-106 --json`); packaged source-runtime build/pre-review/spec-review/review passed with attempts `GH-106-build-f7b903ee2801-29e02f6b95aa`, `GH-106-pre-review-9f7dffcbb1a8-9d4c96ec25a1`, `GH-106-spec-review-03058bd46629-f7533be612f9`, and `GH-106-review-03058bd46629-786ae5346294`; PR #129 metadata readback passed for `work/GH-106-run-query`; review records `.loom/reviews/GH-106.spec.json` and `.loom/reviews/GH-106.json` approve reviewed implementation head `03058bd46629311f5bed076c9338e922f85f2459`, with later PR-head movement limited to `.loom/progress/GH-106.md`, `.loom/status/current.md`, and `.loom/reviews/GH-106*.json` carrier refresh. Review-readiness source-distribution tools are not applicable to this consumer repo because there is no `tools/` directory and `tools/skills_surface.py check`, `tools/loom_check.py --profile source --source-surface contract-only`, `tools/check_release_surface.py`, `tools/version_surface_check.py`, and `tools/check_npm_package.py` are absent. Hosted checks, merge-ready, merge, closeout, and issue closure remain pending.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Authored implementation review approved the GH-106 run query slice at reviewed head 03058bd46629311f5bed076c9338e922f85f2459. The change exposes public Run Record summary query behavior only and leaves result/evidence refs query, smoke, guardrail, and App/API follow-up work to GH-107 through GH-110; subsequent PR-head movement is limited to Loom progress/status/review carrier refresh.
